name: Don't Let Me Rot
short_description: This is a psychological horror game where you will solve puzzles and explore a 90s-style house. The realistic art style enhances the eerie atmosphere of the game. (Please do not play this game before bedtime.)
detailed_description:
This is a psychological horror game where you will explore and solve puzzles in a 90s-style house.

Realistic Style: The realistic art style of the game makes the environment feel more lifelike.

Style: The game emphasizes an eerie atmosphere, using psychological mechanisms to make players feel fear, discomfort, and the sensation of being watched.

This game contains intense horror elements, jump scares, and visuals or audio that may trigger psychological or physiological reactions.
Players with the following conditions are advised to refrain from playing:

  • Heart disease

  • Epilepsy or conditions sensitive to flashing lights

  • Anxiety disorders or other mental health concerns

If you feel unwell during gameplay (e.g., rapid heartbeat, dizziness, difficulty breathing), stop immediately and seek medical advice.
